response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two distinct song performances: 'CH4NGE' (Giga) and 'Fashion Beat' (DECO*27). 2. Performed web searches for both songs to confirm metadata and retrieve full lyrics. 3. Used the search results for 'CH4NGE' for lyrics and performer verification. 4. Extracted 'Fashion Beat' lyrics directly from the video's on-screen text for high accuracy, as it is a recently released original song. 5. Mapped the scenes based on performance, transition, and second performance. 6. Constructed the JSON object with all required fields, escaping quotes, and ensuring timestamp formats.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance by Sakura Miko and Tokoyami Towa. The video is divided into two main vocal song performances, 'CH4NGE' and 'Fashion Beat', separated by a transition segment.

scenes.description: A transition segment featuring a visual montage of the performers and text screens, ending with 'ARE YOU READY?'. No vocal music is playing.
Sakura Miko and Tokoyami Towa perform the song 'Fashion Beat'. The performers dance and sing on a new neon-lit stage.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Painful, even if I close my eyes
I can hear it, anxiety and fear
It won't change even if I worry
What can I do, what should I do
I have no choice but to do it, I have no choice
If I'm going to break, I might as well
Make it easy to fix
What kind of shape can I aim for?
Without a running start, jump
Without a plan, dive
Today's me, I want to praise myself
I want to breathe, I want to resonate more
Hey, maybe I can see something beyond myself
I can't stop the delusions
Fashion Beat
I want to hug and see
Something that seems to be in a dream
I can't just brush it off
Fulfilling it is up to me
Or leave it to someone else
It's fine, it's fine
I want to win against myself
Fashion Beat
Devour the love
Losing? I'm sorry, that has no flavor
Every time, I evolve even if I become ash
I can be reborn
Don't be stupid, be serious
Still, still
I won't let you rot
Like that...
